commands.review_summary:
The branch moves Diagnostics MainView and DetailView padding onto the MaxWidth=900 content containers, trims XAML comments, and removes three Diagnostics XAML layout contract tests.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence runtime reproduction was established in this read-only review. Source inspection gives a medium-confidence path: current main pads Diagnostics outside the 900px content cap while Permissions pads inside it, which should affect wide-window card width.
commands.review_followup: Contributor-supplied real visual proof is required before merge, and automation cannot produce evidence from the contributor's setup.

target.title: Fix Diagnostics page width to match Permissions
target.body:
The Diagnostics page column was slightly wider than Permissions because padding was on the outer `ScrollViewer`/`Grid` while `MaxWidth=900` was on the inner content container — so cards filled the full 900px. Permissions puts `Padding=24` inside the `MaxWidth=900` `StackPanel`, making cards 852px wide.

## Changes
- Move `Padding=24,24,24,24` inward onto the `MaxWidth=900` content containers in both MainView and DetailView so the column matches Permissions exactly.
- Trim verbose layout comments in `DebugPage.xaml`.
- Remove three diagnostics-only XAML contract tests (`DebugPage_PageDimensionsMatchPermissions`, `DebugPage_WrapsCenteredContentInStretchingContainer`, `DebugPage_DetailViewMatchesMainViewPadding`). No other page has equivalents.

## Validation
- `./build.ps1` ✅
- Shared tests: 1891 passed / 29 skipped ✅
- Tray tests: 1175 passed ✅
- Manual: Diagnostics column now visually matches Permissions on wide windows.
target.author: bkudiess
